args.content:
export { authGuard } from "./auth-guard"
export { rateLimit } from "./rate-limit"

text: {"id":"act_update_middleware_index","title":"Export rateLimit from middleware index","summary":"Updated the middleware index to export rateLimit.","changed_paths":["packages/server/src/middleware/index.ts"],"notes":[]}
